name: everything-codex-toolkit
description: Codex-only toolkit of reusable skills, role prompts, workflow prompts, rules, and MCP examples adapted from Everything Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Codex skills, role prompts, workflow prompts, rules, and MCP examples.
interface.longDescription: Everything Codex Toolkit is a Codex-only adaptation of the useful skills, agents, prompts, workflows, and rules from Everything Claude Code. Claude plugin and hook surfaces are not part of the active path.
defaultPrompt: Use the TDD workflow skill for feature work and bug fixes.
Use the security review skill for auth, secrets, input, payment, or sensitive-data changes.
Use the verification loop skill before reporting work complete.
